<!DOCTYPE html> <html> <head> <head> <title>Video.js | HTML5 Video Player</title> <link href="http://vjs.zencdn.net/5.0.2/video-js.css" rel="stylesheet"> <script src="http://vjs.zencdn.net/ie8/1.1.0/videojs-ie8.min.js"></script> <script src="http://vjs.zencdn.net/5.0.2/video.js"></script> </head> </head> <body> <video id="example_video_1" class="video-js vjs-default-skin" controls preload="none" width="640" height="264" poster="http://vjs.zencdn.net/v/oceans.png" data-setup="{}"> <source src="http://vjs.zencdn.net/v/oceans.mp4" type="video/mp4"> <source src="http://vjs.zencdn.net/v/oceans.webm" type="video/webm"> <source src="http://vjs.zencdn.net/v/oceans.ogv" type="video/ogg"> <track kind="captions" src="../shared/example-captions.vtt" srclang="en" label="English"></track> <!-- Tracks need an ending tag thanks to IE9 --> <track kind="subtitles" src="../shared/example-captions.vtt" srclang="en" label="English"></track> <!-- Tracks need an ending tag thanks to IE9 --> <p class="vjs-no-js">To view this video please enable JavaScript, and consider upgrading to a web browser that <a href="http://videojs.com/html5-video-support/" target="_blank">supports HTML5 video</a></p> </video> </body> </html>
